content:
🔥 restreamer | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and cost-effective solution for individuals and organizations to manage and distribute live video streams across multiple platforms and websites.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted streaming server
📖 Summary: Restreamer is a self-hosted, open-source streaming server solution that allows users to ingest live video streams (e.g., from OBS) via RTMP and SRT protocols. It then enables re-streaming to various platforms like YouTube, Twitch, and Vimeo, or embedding a player directly into a website. The solution offers a user-friendly interface, supports multiple codecs and protocols, and includes features for hardware acceleration and monitoring.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
